description: rho_eta <= 0.771 computed in FP64/mpmath, not interval-certified with arb/MPFR. The entire D0 bound depends on this value. All four reviewers flagged this as the most critical gap.
action_taken: Certified via arb ball arithmetic (python-flint, 256-bit precision, ~77 decimal digits). Method: rho(L) <= ||L^256||_inf^{1/256} on dense grid [1.0, 10.0]. Peak: rho_eta <= 0.7606 at t=1.0 (ball radius 6.48e-70). Lipschitz correction K=2.6, h=0.001. This is a MATHEMATICALLY PROVEN upper bound, not a numerical estimate. Script: scripts/experiments/zaremba-effective-bound/certify_rho_arb.py
